item.title: EMANUEL UNGARO Diva Eau de Parfum pour Femme 50 ml
item.description: Vous avez EMANUEL UNGARO Diva Eau de Parfum pour Femme 50 ml ici: ℹ️: This woody mossy fragrance has a blend of oakmoss, sandalwood, patchouli, rose, narcissus, jasmine, iris, and fruity notes Launched by the design house of Emanuel Ungaro It is recommended for special occasions. emanuel ungaro 🛒 Achetez-le maintenant!! Check the price of this item in other countries: 🇬🇧 United Kingdom | 🇺🇸 USA | 🇩🇪 Germany | 🇪🇸 Spain | 🇫🇷 France | 🇮🇹 Italia | 🇦🇪 Arab Emirates | 🇨🇦 Canada | 🇧🇪 Belgium | 🇳🇱 Neederlands | 🇵🇱 Poland | 🇸🇪 Sweden |
